children.text: For this app to work, internet connection is required.
In case there is no internet connection and you have set an alarm, you will be woken up by the default alarm from your mobile phone.
"Set a Timer" for each radio station to start playing at the time you want.
Set a Sleep timer for each radio station to turn off itself.
Set favorites to create a list of favorite channels for quick access.

Widget of the app will appear in the notification in order to manipulate the app, even when turned off. to opt out, push back button on your mobile phone.Create a widget on the home screen for your favorite radio station.

Go to Home Screen > Press Menu button on your phone > Add > Widget > Choose "Popular Music Songs" > Choose a station.

OR

Go to Home Screen > Long press on desktop > Widget > Choose "Popular Music Songs" > Choose a station.
If you recieve a phone call while radio stream, the volume will stop during the phone call.
Share the app on all social networks such as facebook, twitter, line etc...
